series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting parent/legal guardian denial of permission for ODBES to use student images recorded during official school activities/events. Includes opting-out.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until end of school year or until superseded, whichever is later, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until end of school year or until superseded, whichever is later, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
